focusReason: solo recording — Drake is the only unit, therefore the focus

clock.note: videoSec ~= fightClock + 7 (accurate to ~1s); windows chosen >=3s inside each band

colourConvention: white=normal non-core; red+'CORE HIT'=core; orange+crit-icon=crit; exclude 7-digit ~5.9M red = Drake BURST (1254% final ATK, cores); exclude boss red hip-joint glow, red 'TARGET' warning text, reticle counters (00X), cyan BLOCK, green/red over-character heals.

bands.confidence: high (numbers pop against grey sky, clearly readable)

bands.bossDistance: close (near1) to very close/point-blank (near2), boss on right
bands.coreRateNote: LOWER BOUND — red 'CORE HIT' numbers pop against the dark/red-glowing boss body at near, hard to see; true rate may be somewhat higher. Cores confirmed on NON-burst shots (v161.2, near1 a_032), so not an artifact of the burst.
bands.confidence: medium (visibility bias + popup overlap on large near boss)

bands.bossDistance: distant (boss far/centre, smallest apparent size of the fight)
bands.confidence: high (small distant boss, numbers pop against grey sky; any red would be obvious — none seen)

summary.headline: SG per-pellet core rate is ~0% at mid/far/midfar and ~9% (lower bound) at near. There IS a near-range core signal (directionally consistent with core=f(range): near > far), but its MAGNITUDE is an order of magnitude below the hypothesised ~100%-at-optimal-range.
summary.mechanistic: This boss (spider mech) has a small central core (red gem at the crosshair). Auto-aim spreads all 10 pellets across the large body; even point-blank only ~1 pellet/shot lands on the core. Boss geometry likely caps achievable SG core rate far below the theoretical optimum.
confounds: Full-Burst overlap: near windows coincide with FB (pellet 33374 + red screen tint) vs mid/far (25672, no FB). Not fully separable in one solo recording. Mitigant: near cores appear on non-burst shots, and a red-tinted midfar frame (mf_038) still showed 0 core — so the signal tracks NEAR RANGE, not merely FB.
Visibility bias understates near, not far: red numbers vs dark boss body at near are hard to read; red vs grey sky at far is easy. So near is a lower bound; far 0% is reliable.
summary.rangeScriptCrossCheck: PASS — boss genuinely CLOSE during near windows (largest apparent size at v167), and FAR/smallest during 70-106s (v95). Boss also roams left (midfar ~v132) vs right (near/mid).
summary.simRelevance: Engine AUTO_CORE_RATE is a flat 0.85 (calibrated, marked). For Drake's SG on this boss the observed core rate is <=~9% at best and ~0 at range — the flat 0.85 is far too high here. Caveat: single boss with a small core; do not over-generalise across bosses/weapons from this alone.
